generated_oml:
namespace base = "http://www.ontologymodeling.org/oml"
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.com/dtdf"

instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for 3D environmental mapping",
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for RGB-D imaging",
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraRGBDData
]

instance MotorSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring motor rotational speed",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring steering angle",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraRGBDData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance MotorSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance StoredLiDARData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "LiDAR point cloud data stored in SQL database for structured management",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance StoredVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state metrics stored in SQL database for real-time analysis",
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData
]

instance DBSCANProcessedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "LiDAR point cloud processed using DBSCAN clustering",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilteredData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks processed using Kalman filter",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterEnabler
]

instance ACCComputationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "ACC logic processing for lead vehicle detection and speed computation",
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData, LiDARPointCloudData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]

instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm for raw LiDAR point cloud processing",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter-based object tracking for lead vehicle detection",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterEnabler
]

instance ACCLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control logic for lead vehicle detection and speed computation",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 middleware for low-latency communication",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration",
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for algorithm development",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for performance-critical components",
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for simulation and algorithm development",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ISO23247DataTranslation : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Data Translation Functional Element for data serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversions",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DBSCANProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering for raw LiDAR point cloud processing",
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackingService
]

instance KalmanFilterEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filter-based object tracking for lead vehicle detection",
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackingService
]

instance ACCEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control logic for lead vehicle detection and speed computation",
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks via user interface, along with data saving and report generation",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight, DataSavingInsight, ReportGenerationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC system's lead vehicle detection, speed computation based on distance, and actuation control from vehicle ECUs to DT",
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionInsight, SpeedComputationInsight, ActuationControlAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enabling/disabling ACC, setting desired speeds, sending emergency braking commands, and troubleshooting via data collection and monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCCAction, DisableACCCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction, TroubleshootingInsight
]

instance ObjectTrackingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Processing object tracks for lead vehicle detection and tracking",
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionInsight, SpeedComputationInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks"
]

instance DataSavingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Saving of vehicle data for analysis"
]

instance ReportGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generating reports from collected vehicle data"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detecting lead vehicles using object tracks"
]

instance SpeedComputationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Computing speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]

instance ActuationControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Controlling vehicle actuation based on ACC logic",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enabling Adaptive Cruise Control remotely",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disabling Adaptive Cruise Control remotely",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Setting desired speed for ACC system",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sending emergency braking command for collision avoidance",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TroubleshootingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Collecting data for developer troubleshooting"
]

instance VedderESC : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller converting desired speed into motor voltage commands"
]

instance EmergencyBrakingSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle braking system for emergency collision avoidance"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity handling data pre-processing, actuation, device communication, and Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking",
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, MotorSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, VedderESC, EmergencyBrakingSystem, DBSCANProcessingEnabler, KalmanFilterEnabler, ACCEnabler
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity managing data management and control mechanisms",
    base:contains ROS2Middleware, NVIDIAJetpack5, Python38, Cpp, MATLABSimulink, ISO23247DataTranslation
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User Entity comprising 3D Visualization and Control Panel components"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Controlling FE processes specific commands including enabling and disabling ACC, modifying desired speed, and performing emergency braking. These commands are serialized and translated by the Data Translation component, transmitted over ROS2 and Wi-Fi (UDP) networks to the Actuation FE for motor and steering control. Command validation and feedback mechanisms ensure accurate execution and system safety."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for safety-critical vehicular applications to enable computation offloading, as mandated by standards and constrained by hardware limitations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, mapping software components to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as ROS2 packages. Each FE is a ROS2 node or group of nodes, deployed across separate hardware components for Physical Twin, Digital Twin, and User Entities. System-wide coordination is achieved through ROS2 communication, with clock synchronization maintained at 100 ms accuracy for vehicular safety requirements."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system is applied across the automotive product lifecycle, specifically during the design phase of automotive systems for simulation and validation, during vehicle operation for real-time monitoring and diagnostics, and as a product lifecycle management tool integrating data from development through end-of-life."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The system maintains real-time, high-fidelity computational reflections with network latency constrained to ≤100 ms. Clock synchronization mechanisms are enforced to ensure data integrity across all components, with validation processes monitoring system performance against fidelity thresholds."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs over a ROS2 network, while inter-entity communication uses Wi-Fi with UDP transport layer. Network latency is maintained at a maximum of 100 ms as required by system specifications."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliant with ISO 23247:2021 standard, Part 2 (Reference Architecture), defining entity-based structure with Observable Manufacturing Element (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Functional Entities (FEs) may implement interoperability using protocols such as OPC Unified Architecture."
]
